title: Spore+
description: Survive in this world with a mutating and evolving Fungal Infection (title card)
body:
Modpack centered around the Fungal Infection: Spore mod.  
The only notable content mods, if you can call them that, are Relics and Artifacts, as I enjoy them.
I added a ton of generic worldgen mods to make exploration fun, though many of the structures are also perfect breeding grounds for the fungal infection, inciting faster progression of the biomass.
There are also a few QoL mods, mostly just for storage.
Enjoy

Currently way too difficult.

Oh, and I didn't create anything used in this modpack, only putting them together in a manner my friends and I would enjoy, though I do have a datapack in development I intend to add, when it's in a state I can be proud of.
